from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
import pandas as pd
import json
import time
import os
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import traceback

def extract_metadata(element, driver):
    """Extract all possible metadata from a search result"""
    metadata = {}
    try:
        # Basic metadata
        metadata["timestamp"] = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
        metadata["href"] = element.get_attribute("href") if element else None
        
        # Try to get parent element with more data
        parent = element.find_element(By.XPATH, "./ancestor::div[contains(@class, 'g')]")
        
        # Description
        try:
            desc = parent.find_element(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "div.VwiC3b").text
            metadata["description"] = desc
        except:
            metadata["description"] = None

        # Site links (if any)
        try:
            site_links = parent.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "div.mslg")
            metadata["site_links"] = [link.text for link in site_links]
        except:
            metadata["site_links"] = []

        # Rich snippets (if any)
        try:
            snippets = parent.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "div.cr2Mr")
            metadata["rich_snippets"] = [snip.text for snip in snippets]
        except:
            metadata["rich_snippets"] = []

        # Date (if available)
        try:
            date = parent.find_element(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "span.MUxGbd").text
            metadata["date"] = date
        except:
            metadata["date"] = None

        # Domain info
        try:
            domain = parent.find_element(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "cite.qLRx3b").text
            metadata["domain"] = domain
        except:
            metadata["domain"] = None
            
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error extracting metadata: {str(e)}")
        
    return metadata

def scrape_google():
    print("Script started...")
    start_time = datetime.now()
    timeout = timedelta(minutes=2)
    target_results = 50
    
    try:
        print("Initializing Chrome...")
        driver = webdriver.Chrome()
        driver.maximize_window()
        print("Chrome initialized successfully")
        
        # Search parameters
        query = "experiential marketing directories"
        print(f"Searching for: {query}")
        
        # Navigate to Google
        print("Navigating to Google...")
        driver.get("https://www.google.com")
        
        # Find and use search box
        search_box = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(
            EC.presence_of_element_located((By.NAME, "q"))
        )
        search_box.send_keys(query)
        search_box.send_keys(Keys.RETURN)
        
        # Initialize results storage
        all_results = []
        detailed_metadata = []
        page_number = 1
        
        while len(all_results) < target_results and (datetime.now() - start_time) < timeout:
            print(f"\nProcessing page {page_number}...")
            time.sleep(2)  # Wait for results to load
            
            # Find all result elements
            results = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(
                EC.presence_of_all_elements_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "div.g h3"))
            )
            
            print(f"Found {len(results)} results on page {page_number}")
            
            for result in results:
                try:
                    # Get the main link element
                    link = result.find_element(By.XPATH, "./..")
                    if not link.get_attribute("href"):
                        link = link.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "a")
                    
                    # Extract basic info
                    title = result.text
                    url = link.get_attribute("href")
                    
                    # Only process if we have both title and URL
                    if title and url:
                        # Get detailed metadata
                        metadata = extract_metadata(link, driver)
                        
                        # Add to results list
                        result_data = {
                            "Company Name": title,
                            "URL": url,
                            "Description": metadata.get("description", ""),
                            "Page Number": page_number
                        }
                        
                        # Add to metadata list
                        metadata["title"] = title
                        metadata["url"] = url
                        metadata["page_number"] = page_number
                        
                        all_results.append(result_data)
                        detailed_metadata.append(metadata)
                        
                        print(f"Processed result: {title[:50]}...")
                        
                        # Save progress periodically
                        if len(all_results) % 10 == 0:
                            save_progress(all_results, detailed_metadata)
                            
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"Error processing result: {str(e)}")
                    continue
            
            # Try to go to next page if we haven't reached target
            if len(all_results) < target_results:
                try:
                    next_button = driver.find_element(By.ID, "pnnext")
                    next_button.click()
                    page_number += 1
                    print("Moved to next page")
                    time.sleep(2)
                except:
                    print("Could not find next page button")
                    break
        
        # Final save
        save_progress(all_results, detailed_metadata, final=True)
        
        print("\nFinal Results Summary:")
        print(f"Total results: {len(all_results)}")
        print(f"Pages processed: {page_number}")
        print(f"Total time: {datetime.now() - start_time}")
        
    except Exception as e:
        print("\nAn error occurred in the main script:")
        print(str(e))
        traceback.print_exc()
        
    finally:
        print("\nScript finishing...")
        input("Press Enter to close the browser...")
        driver.quit()
        print("Script completed")

def save_progress(results, metadata, final=False):
    """Save results to both CSV and JSON"""
    timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    prefix = "final" if final else "progress"
    
    # Save main results to CSV
    csv_filename = f"google_results_{prefix}.csv"
    pd.DataFrame(results).to_csv(csv_filename, index=False)
    
    # Save detailed metadata to JSON
    json_filename = f"google_metadata_{prefix}.json"
    with open(json_filename, 'w') as f:
        json.dump(metadata, f, indent=4)
    
    print(f"Saved {len(results)} results to {csv_filename}")
    print(f"Saved detailed metadata to {json_filename}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    scrape_google()
